overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night, approaching and entering the No-Tell Motel from Cyberpunk 2077. The scene transitions from neon-lit wet streets to the motel's interior corridors and rooms, featuring heavy atmospheric rain effects and distinctive pink and cyan neon signage throughout.

segments.scene_description: Approaching the No-Tell Motel building, the camera looks up at the tall facade before entering through the metal security gate. A pedestrian with a glowing umbrella walks by as the scene transitions from open street to the sheltered entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked cyberpunk street into the dim, industrial depths of the No-Tell Motel. It begins on wet asphalt reflecting vibrant pink and cyan neon lights as a black vehicle passes in the distance, moving forward toward the motel's tall facade and through a metal security gate. As the camera transitions from the open street to the sheltered lobby, it passes a woman standing beneath a glowing cyan sign in an area bathed in saturated pink and blue light. The scene then shifts from the bright lobby into narrower, moody corridors covered in graffiti, eventually opening into a side room featuring an illuminated MIXIT vending machine. Finally, the camera moves through a service area marked by a BEEP neon sign and piles of trash before exiting into a dark loading dock under harsh industrial lighting.
